name: Official Grand Depart Barcelona 2026 Organizer Site
summary: Ajuntament-linked official Grand Depart site for stages, cities, news, and organizer updates.
whyItMatters: This is the official city/organizer landing page to monitor for race programming, route updates, and city links beyond ASO's stage pages.
pros: Official organizer site linked by TMB and branded with Ajuntament/Gencat partners
Confirms the three Catalonia stages on July 4, 5, and 6
Includes Barcelona, Tarragona, and Granollers city pages
Useful for official news and route/programme updates
cons: Does not currently surface detailed road-closure tables in the extracted page text
Some cultural-event programme details may be in news posts or dynamic pages that need follow-up
Not a substitute for TMB or local police/traffic notices

logistics.opening_hours: Website resource; check periodically before and during Grand Depart week
logistics.transit: Links out to official public agencies; use with TMB notice for Barcelona transit specifics
logistics.road_closure_notes: Use as primary official organizer index, then verify closure details with TMB/Ajuntament mobility notices.

timing.best_visit_window: Review again in the final week before July 2-6

sources.title: Ajuntament de Barcelona - Tour de France Barcelona 2026
sources.note: Official organizer site confirming the Grand Depart, stage dates, start cities, news, and partner links.

sources.title: Ajuntament de Barcelona - Barcelona city page
sources.note: Official city page with Barcelona context, sustainable mobility and cycling-culture framing, and organizer footer.

sources.title: TMB - Tour de France
sources.note: Official transit page links to the Ajuntament Grand Depart site for schedule information.

open_questions: Where on the organizer site is the final public programme for the Festa Major / city activities?
Will the site publish downloadable official route and pedestrian-crossing maps for each Barcelona event day?
